title: Overwatch x NieR: Automata: Everything we know about the collab
summary:

title: VALORANT launches Night Queue challenge
summary:
Riot Games has launched the Night Queue challenge, a limited-time event in VALORANT that rewards players with in-game cosmetics. Running from March 4th to 23rd, 2026, players strive to earn points by participating in matches, competing with friends, and submitting shorts online. There are two stages to complete during the Night Queue event. Players must … Continued

title: Garena announces launch of Free Fire World Series USA
summary:
Garena has announced the launch of the Free Fire World Series (FFWS) USA event, offering a pathway for teams in the United States to qualify for the 2026 Esports World Cup. The inaugural event begins on March 6th with an in-game open qualifier determining which teams secure a place in the Group Stage, taking place … Continued

title: ESL FACEIT Group named operator of eMLS Cup 2026
summary:

summary:

title: OpTic Gaming unveils $10,000 Battlefield REDSEC Cup
summary:
Esports organisation OpTic Gaming has announced that it will host the Battlefield REDSEC Cup, presented by tournament platform Repeat.gg. summary:

title: All 2026 Fortnite Reload Elite Series Championship qualified duos
summary:
